meaning: adj.没有天赋的,缺乏才能的,不聪明的
examples: Untalented sports team often resort to dirty tricks to win.
Untalented sports teams often resort to dirty tricks to win.
You will not be an untalented guy, if you dare to let your dreams fly.
So your business is losing out on talented people (and wasting time with untalented ones) based on their looks.
While some critics have hailed Emin as an outstanding artist who speaks with unique intensity, she has also been disparaged as an untalented self-publicist.
